content.speakerText: How long does approval usually take?

options.text: It takes about 3–5 business days after submission.
It’s processed immediately once you submit it.
You need to wait for a full month before it’s approved.

content.explanation: 正确答案准确反映了审批的典型周期（3–5个工作日），符合职场实际流程。干扰项1错误地暗示审批是即时的，不符合现实；干扰项2夸大了等待时间；干扰项3错误地限定了审批只在周一发生，无依据。

content.speakerText: When will the money hit my account?

options.text: Within 2 days after approval—payroll runs every Friday.
It will be deposited as soon as the approval is confirmed.
You’ll get it next Monday regardless of when it’s approved.
The bank processes reimbursements every day, so it’s immediate.

content.explanation: 正确答案结合了审批后的时间和发薪周期，是清晰且专业的回应。干扰项1虽然语法正确，但忽略了公司发薪周期的限制，过于理想化；干扰项2错误地假设银行会即时处理；干扰项3错误地固定了到账时间，与实际流程不符。

content.speakerText: I submitted my expense report last Tuesday. When should I expect approval?
content.speakerTextCn: 我上周二提交了报销单，我什么时候能等到审批？

options.text: You should hear back by Friday, since it’s usually 3–5 business days.
It’s already late, so it won’t be approved this month.
You need to resubmit it because Tuesday is a bad day to file.
Approval only happens if you email your manager directly.

content.explanation: 正确答案合理推算提交后3–5个工作日，符合职场常规。干扰项1制造恐慌，无依据；干扰项2错误地认为提交日影响审批，且暗示流程有歧视；干扰项3错误地将流程与是否发邮件挂钩，混淆了标准流程。
